name: AlphaFold MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server providing AI agents with access to AlphaFold Protein Structure Database — DeepMind/EBI's groundbreaking database of predicted protein structures for 200M+ proteins. Enables agents to retrieve protein structure predictions by UniProt accession, access confidence scores, download structure files (PDB/mmCIF), and integrate protein structure data into biological research workflows.
use_cases: Retrieving protein structure predictions for target proteins from drug discovery agents
Accessing AlphaFold confidence scores and structural metadata from protein engineering agents
Downloading PDB structure files for molecular visualization from research agents
Integrating protein structure data into bioinformatics analysis pipelines from computational biology agents
not_for: Running AlphaFold predictions (this accesses pre-computed structures — not for new predictions)
Non-protein structural biology (nucleic acids, lipids use different databases)
Real-time protein structure prediction (pre-computed database only)
best_when: A structural biologist or drug discovery researcher wants AI agents to query AlphaFold's precomputed structure database — accessing structural predictions for virtually any known protein quickly.
avoid_when: You need custom structure predictions for novel proteins or sequences not in the database — use ColabFold or AlphaFold server directly for new predictions.

auth.notes: No authentication required — AlphaFold Database is free and publicly accessible from EBI.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Completely free — AlphaFold DB is a public EBI resource
pricing.notes: AlphaFold Protein Structure Database is free from EMBL-EBI. MCP server is free open source from Augmented-Nature.

performance.rate_limits: AlphaFold API: moderate rate limits; use responsibly for bulk access

known_agent_gotchas: Requires UniProt accession codes for lookup — agents must know the protein identifier
AlphaFold confidence scores (pLDDT) require biological interpretation — low-confidence regions are disordered
Structure files are large (multi-MB) — handle download timeouts appropriately
From Augmented-Nature (life sciences AI company) — domain-appropriate implementation
agent_readiness.security_notes: No credentials required. Public EBI database. HTTPS. EU data hosting. Open scientific data — no privacy or security concerns for standard research use.

security_score_components.security_notes: Public EBI database. HTTPS. EU hosting. No credentials. No sensitive data. Open research resource.
